    specialize this n; simp at this; rw [← this]
    have : f n = f 0 := rfl
    rw [this]; simp; omega
  exact Nat.odd_iff_not_even.mp (by decide) (Nat.even_iff_mod_two_eq_zero.mpr h_false)

end IMO2021P5

by_contra! h
  let n : ℕ := 2021
  let P k := (move^[k] (p, 0)).1
  let f k := (∑ i : Fin n, if (P k i < k) ≠ (P k (i + 1) < k) then (1 : ℤ) else 0) / 2
  have h_step (k : Fin n) : f (k + 1) ≡ f k + 1 [ZMOD 2] := by
    let w := P k
    let h_pos := w.symm k
    let L := w (h_pos - 1)
    let R := w (h_pos + 1)
    have h_not_between : (L < k ∧ R < k) ∨ (L > k ∧ R > k) := by
      specialize h k
      simp [Position.swapped, Position.nth] at h
      cases' lt_or_gt_of_ne (L.2.ne k.2) with hL hL <;>
      cases' lt_or_gt_of_ne (R.2.ne k.2) with hR hR <;>
      aesop
    have h_swap : ∀ i, (P (k + 1) i < k) = (P k i < k) := by
      intro i
      simp [P, move_iterate_succ]
      let sw := Equiv.swap L R
      have : (L < k) = (R < k) := by aesop
      by_cases hi : i = h_pos - 1
      · simp [hi, Position.swapped, this]
      · by_cases hi2 : i = h_pos + 1
        · simp [hi2, Position.swapped, this]
        · have : sw (w i) = w i := by
            apply Equiv.swap_apply_of_ne_of_ne <;>
            · intro heq; apply_fun w.symm at heq; aesop
          simp [Position.swapped, this]
    let g (j : ℕ) (q : Position) := (∑ i : Fin n, if (q i < j) ≠ (q (i + 1) < j) then (1 : ℤ) else 0) / 2
    have h_f_g : f (k + 1) = g (k + 1) (P (k + 1)) := rfl
    have h_g_swap : g k (P (k + 1)) = f k := by
      simp [g, f]; congr; ext i; rw [h_swap, h_swap]
    have h_g_diff : g (k + 1) (P (k + 1)) ≡ g k (P (k + 1)) + 1 [ZMOD 2] := by
      let q := P (k + 1)
      let s (j : ℕ) i := q i < j
      let diff_count (j : ℕ) := ∑ i : Fin n, if s j i ≠ s j (i + 1) then (1 : ℤ) else 0
      have : diff_count (k + 1) ≡ diff_count k + 2 [ZMOD 4] := by
        let h_k := q.symm k
        have h_sk : ∀ i, s (k + 1) i = (s k i ∨ i = h_k) := by
          intro i; simp [s]; exact (Nat.lt_succ_iff_lt_or_eq).symm
        let Lk := h_k - 1
        let Rk := h_k + 1
        have hL : s k Lk = s (k + 1) Lk := by simp [s]; aesop
        have hR : s k Rk = s (k + 1) Rk := by simp [s]; aesop
        have h_side : s k Lk = s k Rk := by simp [s]; aesop
        have h_sum_diff : diff_count (k + 1) - diff_count k =
          (if s (k+1) Lk ≠ s (k+1) h_k then 1 else 0) + (if s (k+1) h_k ≠ s (k+1) Rk then 1 else 0) -
          (if s k Lk ≠ s k h_k then 1 else 0) - (if s k h_k ≠ s k Rk then 1 else 0) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_diff_labels] <;> sorry
        rw [h_sum_diff]; simp [h_sk, hL, hR, h_side, s]; split_ifs <;> norm_num
      sorry
    rw [h_f_g, ← h_g_swap]; exact h_g_diff
  have h_total : f n ≡ f 0 + n [ZMOD 2] := by
    induction' n with m ih
    · simp [f, P]
    · have : m < 2021 := by sorry
      specialize h_step ⟨m, this⟩
      sorry
  have hf0 : f 0 = 0 := by simp [f, P]
  have hfn : f 2021 = 0 := by simp [f, P]; apply Finset.sum_eq_zero; intro i _; simp [i.is_lt]
  simp [hfn, hf0, n] at h_total
  norm_num at h_total

by_contra! h
  let n := 2021
  let χ (k : ℕ) (i : Fin n) : ZMod 2 := if (move^[k] (p, 0)).1 i < k then 1 else 0
  let V (k : ℕ) : ZMod 2 := ∑ i, χ k i * χ k (i + 1)
  have h_inv : ∀ k < n, V (k + 1) = V k := by
    intro k hk
    let pk := (move^[k] (p, 0)).1
    let hkp := pk.symm ⟨k, hk⟩
    have hχ : ∀ i, χ (k + 1) i = χ k i + if i = hkp then 1 else 0 := by
      intro i; simp [χ, move, Position.swapped, pk, ←pk.symm_apply_eq]
      have h_not := h ⟨k, hk⟩; split_ifs <;> (try omega) <;> (try simp [Equiv.swap_apply_def]; split_ifs <;> omega)
    simp [V, hχ, Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.mul_add, Finset.add_mul, Finset.sum_ite]
    simp [Fin.add_one_ne_self (by omega), (Fin.sub_add_cancel _).symm, (Fin.sub_one_ne_self (by omega))]
    have h_not := h ⟨k, hk⟩; let w1 := (pk.swapped ⟨k, hk⟩).1; let w2 := (pk.swapped ⟨k, hk⟩).2
    have : (w1 < k) = (w2 < k) := by simp [Position.swapped, pk] at h_not; omega
    simp [χ, w1, w2, pk, this]

    simp [V, χ]; have : ∀ i : Fin n, χ n i = 1 := by intro i; simp [χ, i.2]
    simp [this]

    rw [h_move, Equiv.trans_assoc, Equiv.symm_trans, Equiv.Perm.sign_trans, Equiv.Perm.sign_swap (Fin.ne_of_gt (by
      have := h k; cases this with | h1 => exact h1.1.trans h1.2 | h2 => exact h2.1.trans h2.2))]
